channel.title: Elliott Bay Book Company Events
channel.description: Upcoming events for Elliott Bay Book Company Events

item.title: Horror Reading: Joe Milutis, Evan J Peterson, Erik Keevan, & Leanne Machado
item.description:
Monday, April 13, 2026 at 7 PM

Location: The Elliott Bay Book Company, 1521 10th Avenue, Seattle, WA, 98122

Elliott Bay Book Co. and UW Bothell's Gamut present OFFICE HOURS: A Reading Series

Event details

item.title: Teo Shannon w/ Michele Bombardier, A CHRONOLOGY OF BLOOD
item.description:
Tuesday, April 14, 2026 at 7 PM

Location: The Elliott Bay Book Company, 1521 10th Avenue, Seattle, WA, 98122

The poems in a chronology of blood embrace trauma survivors, the LGBTQ+ community, and lovers of poetry

Event details

item.title: Tiffany Tsao & Gabriella Page-Fort: The Unique World of Author-Translators
item.description:
Wednesday, April 15, 2026 at 7 PM

Location: The Elliott Bay Book Company, 1521 10th Avenue, Seattle, WA, 98122

Discussing the synergies and tensions of writing/translating while translating/writing.

Event details

item.title: Brandon Bye w/ Lisa van Dam-Bates & Nate Gowdy, MORE PAINT
item.description:
Thursday, April 16, 2026 at 7 PM

Location: The Elliott Bay Book Company, 1521 10th Avenue, Seattle, WA, 98122

More Paint is a meditation on power and place, capturing Seattle at a crossroads where homelessness, graffiti, and civic control collide

Event details

item.title: Offsite: David George Haskell , HOW FLOWERS MADE OUR WORLD
item.description:
Friday, April 17, 2026 at 1:30 PM

Location: Volunteer Park Conservatory, 1400 East Galer Street, Seattle, WA, 98112

Discussing the power of flowers at the Volunteer Park Conservatory

Event details

item.title: Ellen Morris Bishop, LIVING WITH THUNDER
item.description:
Friday, April 17, 2026 at 7 PM

Location: The Elliott Bay Book Company, 1521 10th Avenue, Seattle, WA, 98122

A landmark investigation into forensic medicine exposing systematic concealment of state-sanctioned violence through death investigations

Event details

item.title: Visual Poetry: Amaranth Borsuk, MK Reed, Ashley Gilland, & Angelica Urquizo
item.description:
Monday, April 20, 2026 at 7 PM

Location: The Elliott Bay Book Company, 1521 10th Avenue, Seattle, WA, 98122

A collection of essays pairing travelogue and criticism, fifty years after the Fall of Saigon

Event details

item.title: Jake Rose w/ Ally Ang, JOAN
item.description:
Wednesday, April 22, 2026 at 7 PM

Location: The Elliott Bay Book Company, 1521 10th Avenue, Seattle, WA, 98122

A narrative sequence of lyric poems reimagining Joan of Arc as a framework for queer identity, transformation, and poetic voice

Event details

item.title: Kanako Nishi & Allison Markin Powell w/ Gabriella Page-Fort, SAKURA
item.description:
Thursday, April 23, 2026 at 7 PM

Location: The Elliott Bay Book Company, 1521 10th Avenue, Seattle, WA, 98122

The Japanese bestseller 'Sakura' is available in English at last!

Event details

item.title: Marcus Kliewer w/ Sadie Hartmann, THE CARETAKER
item.description:
Friday, April 24, 2026 at 7 PM

Location: The Elliott Bay Book Company, 1521 10th Avenue, Seattle, WA, 98122

What starts as a peculiar side gig soon becomes a waking nightmare...

Event details

item.title: David Szalay, FLESH
item.description:
Monday, April 27, 2026 at 7 PM

Location: The Elliott Bay Book Company, 1521 10th Avenue, Seattle, WA, 98122

The winner of the Booker Prize 2025 visits the store!

Event details

item.title: Raúl Sánchez w/ Priscilla Long, WHEN WE WERE WATER
item.description:
Tuesday, April 28, 2026 at 7 PM

Location: The Elliott Bay Book Company, 1521 10th Avenue, Seattle, WA, 98122

An abundant new work that continues to experiment in forms and shapes, always with humor and human vitality

Event details

item.title: Jordan Ritter Conn w/ Sarah Enni, AMERICAN MEN: AN INVESTIGATION
item.description:
Wednesday, April 29, 2026 at 7 PM

Location: The Elliott Bay Book Company, 1521 10th Avenue, Seattle, WA, 98122

A deeply intimate portrait of the lives of four men that examines—in profound and comprehensive ways—what it means to be a man in America

Event details

item.title: Erin L. McCoy, UNDERLAKE
item.description:
Thursday, April 30, 2026 at 7 PM

Location: The Elliott Bay Book Company, 1521 10th Avenue, Seattle, WA, 98122

A richly glittering debut about the interlocked fates of two women, raised worlds apart, who must join forces on an extraordinary journey

Event details

item.title: Clare Follmann w/ Gedney Barclay, SCAPEGOAT
item.description:
Monday, May 4, 2026 at 7 PM

Location: The Elliott Bay Book Company, 1521 10th Avenue, Seattle, WA, 98122

The problem with invasive species is a problem of capitalism.

Event details

item.title: Mark Frost w/ Harley Peyton, THE YANKEE SPHINX
item.description:
Tuesday, May 5, 2026 at 7 PM

Location: The Elliott Bay Book Company, 1521 10th Avenue, Seattle, WA, 98122

From the cocreator of 'Twin Peaks' comes a novel about one of FDR’s closest wartime advisers and the president’s final days

Event details

item.title: Willy Vlautin, THE LEFT AND THE LUCKY
item.description:
Wednesday, May 6, 2026 at 7 PM

Location: The Elliott Bay Book Company, 1521 10th Avenue, Seattle, WA, 98122

A beautiful and bittersweet portrait that illuminates the power of friendship and how it can save lives in multiple ways

Event details

item.title: Daniel Seddiqui, DRINKIN' UP THE PACIFIC NORTHWEST
item.description:
Thursday, May 7, 2026 at 7 PM

Location: The Elliott Bay Book Company, 1521 10th Avenue, Seattle, WA, 98122

An immersive journey guiding adventurous travelers through the Pacific Northwest’s beverage culture!

Event details

item.title: Alexandra Oliva w/ Thomas Kohnstamm, THE RADIANT DARK
item.description:
Friday, May 8, 2026 at 7 PM

Location: The Elliott Bay Book Company, 1521 10th Avenue, Seattle, WA, 98122

A bold and compassionate exploration of the universe around us and what it truly means to be human

Event details

item.title: Jake Skeets, HORSES
item.description:
Sunday, May 10, 2026 at 7 PM

Location: The Elliott Bay Book Company, 1521 10th Avenue, Seattle, WA, 98122

This highly anticipated second collection patiently tracks the impacts of climate change on the land and its myriad inhabitants

Event details

item.title: Annie Leonard & André Carothers, PROTEST: RESPECT IT DEFEND IT USE IT
item.description:
Monday, May 11, 2026 at 7 PM

Location: The Elliott Bay Book Company, 1521 10th Avenue, Seattle, WA, 98122

A powerful look at the role peaceful activism has played in advancing the public good

Event details

item.title: Hillary Behrman w/ Rod Driver, LAKE EFFECT: STORIES
item.description:
Tuesday, May 12, 2026 at 7 PM

Location: The Elliott Bay Book Company, 1521 10th Avenue, Seattle, WA, 98122

A debut collection about the wild and hidden places in nature and the heart

Event details

item.title: MONKEY New Writing from Japan
item.description:
Wednesday, May 13, 2026 at 7 PM

Location: The Elliott Bay Book Company, 1521 10th Avenue, Seattle, WA, 98122

With Rebecca Brown, Hideo Furukawa, & Tomoka Shibasaki w/ Roland Kelts & Motoyuki Shibata

Event details

item.title: M Lin w/ Larry Guo, THE MEMORY MUSEUM
item.description:
Thursday, May 14, 2026 at 7 PM

Location: The Elliott Bay Book Company, 1521 10th Avenue, Seattle, WA, 98122

An expansive debut collection exploring the complex lives of women in China and the Chinese diaspora

Event details

item.title: Ed Taylor w/ Enrique Cerna, THE POWER OF THE RIVER
item.description:
Friday, May 22, 2026 at 7 PM

Location: The Elliott Bay Book Company, 1521 10th Avenue, Seattle, WA, 98122

A memoir steeped in the universal truths and human pursuits of love, grace, forgiveness, and continued growth

Event details
